findings.title: CVE-2026-33017: Langflow Unauthenticated RCE Exploited in the Wild
findings.summary: Unauthenticated attackers can send attacker-controlled flow data to the public build endpoint, triggering exec() without sandboxing; Sysdig documented active exploitation within 20 hours of disclosure, with three PoC repos appearing overnight.

findings.title: CVE-2026-20127: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Auth Bypass Actively Exploited by Chinese APT UAT-8616
findings.summary: Unauthenticated remote attackers bypass authentication and gain administrative privileges via crafted vdaemon requests; UAT-8616 has chained this with CVE-2022-20775 for root access, with Cisco Talos and ACSC attributing activity back at least three years.

findings.title: CVE-2026-22200: osTicket PHP Filter Chain + CNEXT RCE Chain (Horizon3.ai PoC)
findings.summary: Anonymous attackers abuse mPDF PHP filter chain injection in ticket-to-PDF export to exfiltrate arbitrary server files, then chain with CVE-2024-2961 (CNEXT) for remote code execution; Horizon3.ai published a full PoC targeting thousands of internet-exposed SLED and SMB helpdesk instances.

findings.title: Chrysalis: Undocumented Lotus Blossom Backdoor Delivered via Notepad++ Update Infrastructure
findings.summary: Lotus Blossom (Chinese APT) poisoned Notepad++ update distribution to install Chrysalis, a previously undocumented backdoor using DLL sideloading and a Warbird-protected loader against government and CI targets.

findings.title: VoidStealer: First In-the-Wild Chrome ABE Bypass via Hardware Debugger Breakpoints
findings.summary: VoidStealer v2.0 MaaS extracts Chrome's v20_master_key directly from process memory by attaching as a debugger and using hardware breakpoints during startup decryption, bypassing ABE without privilege escalation or code injection; first in-the-wild adoption of the ElevationKatz/ChromeKatz technique.

findings.title: CVE-2026-29058: AVideo Encoder Unauthenticated OS Command Injection — Metasploit Module Released
findings.summary: An unauthenticated attacker can inject OS commands via the getImage.php endpoint in AVideo Encoder; Rapid7 released an official Metasploit module in the March 20 wrap-up, significantly lowering the exploitation barrier for mass exploitation.

findings.title: CVE-2026-23745: node-tar < 7.5.3 Arbitrary File Overwrite via Hardlink Path Traversal
findings.summary: The library resolves hardlink and symlink targets using path.resolve() on unsanitized attacker-controlled linkpath values, allowing malicious tar archives to overwrite arbitrary files outside the extraction root even with preservePaths: false; patched in v7.5.3.

noted.summary: Researcher Cortex Security Research claims pre-auth root RCE (CVSS 10.0) via command injection in the troubleshooting actioner triggered by a port-knocking TCP sequence on port 22; CVE is RESERVED in NVD and no vendor advisory found — treat as unverified pending DigitalOcean confirmation.
